name: I can copy talents
author: Cang Lao Shi De Jian Shen
summary:
Ye Tian: My friend, your fierce beast, the armored rhinoceros, is good. Can I touch it?
A certain proud girl nodded in confusion.
Ye Tian touched the armored rhinoceros and secretly copied the top defense talent of the armored rhinoceros.
Ye Tian: Friend, let's make friends.
Ye Tian stretched out his right hand, shook hands with the somewhat confused genius, secretly copied the other party's advanced cultivation talent, and showed a wretched smile.
Ye Tian, ​​who traveled from 2019 to a hundred years later, said that in this era of talent, he has no talent that he can't copy with the talent of copying.
The world's strongest talent genius was born.
Ye Tian: My journey is the sea of ​​stars!
